Ran mutating selective sync and compass refresh so the release-target view shows all three Claude workstreams in the active 0.1.11 set. 44 runtime tests passed (test_host_runtime_contract, test_agent_runtime_contract, test_execution_governance, test_claude_host_statusline, test_claude_host_precompact_snapshot, test_claude_project_hooks).

what_it_is: Installable local governance and execution agent and a platform that packages context grounding, governance surfaces, delivery intelligence, subagent control, and operator tooling behind one CLI.
why_tracked: Defines the top-level product boundary so Odylith can self-govern and consumers can treat it as an installed product rather than a copied implementation detail.
